candidate.problem: repair --json embedded the original PromptRecord directly in each repair entry.
candidate.risk: Opt-in repair JSON could echo risky prompt text even after scan prompt previews gained redaction.
candidate.decision: Build repair entries through a shared redacted prompt-record helper.

red.evidence: The new test failed because the repair JSON entry helper did not exist yet.

green.evidence: The focused test passed after repair JSON prompt records used the shared redaction path.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 41 Rust library tests passed, 15 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.

format_verification.evidence: The touched CLI file matched rustfmt output.

staged_checks.evidence: gitleaks scanned staged code and found no leaks.
